title: How To Create A Custom Server

messages.content: # Want to host your own private server within No Hesi, for only yourself / friends? Follow this guide!

# Prerequisite:
> **Please read: <#1431129424211742822>  - that FAQ outlines what public/tiered users gain access to. **
> **This guide will be overarching, so certain tiers/public users may be limited compared to what is shown.**

# Step 1:
> Head over to: https://nohesi.gg/custom-servers and **select the region** you wish for all your servers to be hosted on.

# Step 2:
> Click "New Preset" then:
> 1. Set a **Server Name**
> 2. Select a **Time Of Day**
> 3. Select a **Weather Condition**
> 4. *Optionally*: Set a password to make your server private

# Step 3:
> 1. **Select a map of your choosing**. You are able to filter by tiers/search for specific maps.
> -# *Tiered map will only be usable by members who have an equivalent or higher tier*
> 2. **Select a traffic pattern of your choosing**. 
> -# *Some traffic options may not be available on certain maps.*

# Step 4: 
> **Select up to 32 cars to host on your server**. *Tiered cars will only be usable by members who have an equivalent or higher tier*
> -# *Some cars will not count to the LB. There is a list of these available here: ⁠https://discord.com/channels/964645662866173972/1411870784418218005/1420390785467289640 *

# Step 5:
> Confirm everything is correct under the Summary tab. Once ready, hit **Save Preset** > **Use Preset** > **Start Server** > **Join Server** / **Share Link**
> 
> If you are missing any content: <#1322223184367587462> 
> 
> If your server is stuck in queue or not loading, please follow: <#1418486111231017091>
